evidence: Chandler Arizonan reported Dec 15 2022 that Aligned bought 456122 sqft building at 2501 S Price Rd for $115M as part of its Phoenix Metro mega-campus expansion; first construction permit filed Jan 2024 per MLQ.ai; topping-out June 2024 per Baxtel.

Meta announced May 4 2022 a three-building expansion of Mesa campus (Buildings 3-5) raising investment to over $1B and 2.5M sqft; original campus announcement was Aug 2021 but Mesa 4 is part of May 2022 expansion wave; op year 2024 consistent with post-2022 build.

Same May 2022 Meta Mesa expansion announcement covering three new buildings (4/5/6) on a five-building campus; DCD confirmed campus online Jan 2025 with two buildings; Mesa 5 is a later phase of the same 2022 expansion.

Google's own location page confirms 2015 expansion announcement at Council Bluffs; DCD Aug 2023 confirms waves at 2007/2012/2015/2022/2023; building 4 op year 2015 matches the 2015 expansion wave announcement.

Google's Oct 2022 $600M Council Bluffs announcement (IEDA $16.6M tax break sign-off; construction Q3 2022; operational target end-2024 per Des Moines Register); DCD Aug 2023 follow-on covers same wave; building 10 op year 2023 aligns with this 2022 expansion wave.

Hermiston City Council voted Sept 26 2022 to approve Amazon's Long-Term Rural Enterprise Zone abatement for two new Hermiston campuses (9.97-acre and 120.83-acre plots); DCD reported Sept 30 2022; ground-breaking expected ~2024 per abatement docs; PDX132 at Beach Access Rd Umatilla is part of this Sept 2022 approved campus.

Same Sept 2022 Hermiston/Umatilla County Enterprise Zone approval; PDX194 at 80939 Powerline Rd Hermiston is the second plot (120-acre site adjacent to Hermiston power plant) from the same council vote; abatement documents reference first four qualifying data centers ≥180000 sqft.

Same Sept 2022 campus approval; PDX133 is a sequential phase of the same Hermiston Umatilla County campus; abatement agreement covers first four qualifying buildings; op year 2025 consistent with later construction phase within the 2022 announcement.

Same Sept 2022 campus approval covering multiple buildings on two plots; PDX195 is a later phase of the Hermiston Powerline Rd campus; no separate announcement found; attributing to the 2022 council approval as earliest credible public date.
